Class WorkspaceReport

java.lang.Object
network.ike.plugin.ws.WorkspaceReport
public final class WorkspaceReport extends Object
Thread-safe cumulative report writer for workspace goals.

Each goal appends a timestamped markdown section to target/ws-report.md in the workspace root. The file accumulates across a session and is removed by mvn clean.

File locking via FileChannel.lock() ensures safe concurrent writes, honoring the @ThreadSafe contract of Maven plugins.

  • Method Details

    • append

      public static void append(Path workspaceRoot, String goalName, String content, org.apache.maven.plugin.logging.Log log)
      Append a goal's output to the workspace report file.

      Creates the target/ directory and report file if they don't exist. Uses file-level locking for thread safety.

      Parameters:
      workspaceRoot - the workspace root directory
      goalName - the goal that produced this output (e.g., "ws:add")
      content - the markdown content to append
      log - Maven logger (warnings only; null-safe)

    • reportPath

      public static Path reportPath(Path workspaceRoot)
      Resolve the report file path for the given workspace root.
      Parameters:
      workspaceRoot - the workspace root directory
      Returns:
      path to the report file (may not exist yet)

    • openInBrowser

      public static boolean openInBrowser(Path workspaceRoot, org.apache.maven.plugin.logging.Log log)
      Open the report file in the default browser.
      Parameters:
      workspaceRoot - the workspace root directory
      log - Maven logger
      Returns:
      true if the file was opened, false if it doesn't exist or open failed
